title: Venezuelan Cornmeal Empanadas
description: A traditional Venezuelan dish, these cornmeal empanadas are flavorful and easy to make.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine cornmeal, water, and moist. Mix well.
Add venezuelan and mix until dough forms.
Roll each piece into a ball and flatten slightly into a disk.
Place a spoonful of crumbly cheese in the center of each disk.
Fold dough in half and press edges together to seal.
Heat a large skillet over medium heat.
Cook empanadas for 2-3 minutes on each side, until golden brown.
